mapper.sql: CASE #{statusColumn} WHEN 'DCLR_WAIT' THEN '신고대기' WHEN 'DCLR_REVIEW' THEN '심사중' WHEN 'DCLR_DONE' THEN '신고완료' WHEN 'DCLR_REJ' THEN '반려' WHEN 'DCLR_SUPP_REQ' THEN '보완요청' WHEN 'DCLR_SUPP_SUB' THEN '보완제출' WHEN 'TAX_UNPAID' THEN '세금납부대기' WHEN 'TAX_PAID' THEN '세금납부완료' ELSE NVL(#{statusColumn}, '-') END

LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT WI.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY WI.WI_GG_NO ORDER BY WI.WI_UPDT_DT DESC, WI.WI_NO DESC) AS RN FROM WAREHOUSE_ITEM WI WHERE WI.WI_USE_YN = 'Y' ) WHERE RN = 1 ) WI ON WI.WI_GG_NO = CARGO.GG_NO LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE_ZONE WZ ON WZ.WZ_NO = WI.WIL_CL_NO LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE WH ON WH.WH_NO = WZ.WZ_WH_NO
mapper.select:
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SORT_DT DESC NULLS LAST, REQ_NO DESC) AS "no", LIST_NO AS "listNo", TO_CHAR(GG_NO) AS "goodsGroupNo", CARGO_MANAGE_NO AS "cargoManageNo", '적재화물' AS "cargoType", 'LOADED' AS "cargoTypeCd", BL_NO AS "blNo", MBL_NO AS "mblNo", HBL_NO AS "hblNo", BL_STATUS_CD AS "blStatusCd", NVL(BL_STATUS_CD, '-') AS "blStatus", REQ_NO AS "reqNo", DECLARE_TYPE AS "declareType", DECLARE_STATUS_CD AS "declareStatusCd", DECLARE_STATUS AS "declareStatus", OWNER_NAME AS "ownerName", ITEM_NAME AS "itemName", '-' AS "vesselName", SUBMIT_STATUS_CD AS "submitStatusCd", SUBMIT_STATUS AS "submitStatus", TO_CHAR(SUBMIT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "submitDate", TRANSPORT_NO AS "transportNo", DEPARTURE_PORT AS "departurePort", ARRIVAL_PORT AS "arrivalPort", TRANSPORT_STATUS_CD AS "transportStatusCd", NVL(TRANSPORT_STATUS_CD, '-') AS "transportStatus", TRADER_NAME AS "traderName", WH_NM AS "warehouseName", WZ_NM AS "warehouseZoneName", WH_STATUS_CD AS "warehouseStatusCd", NVL(WH_STATUS_CD, '-') AS "warehouseStatus", WI_STATUS_CD AS "warehouseItemStatusCd", NVL(WI_STATUS_CD, '-') AS "warehouseItemStatus", WI_SEAL_NO AS "sealNo", REMARK AS "remark", QUANTITY AS "quantity", WEIGHT AS "weight" FROM ( /* 수출 적재화물 */ SELECT TO_CHAR(ECM.ECM_NO) AS LIST_NO, ED.ED_GG_NO AS GG_NO, NVL(ECM.ECM_BL_NO, BI.BI_MBL_NO) AS CARGO_MANAGE_NO, NVL(ECM.ECM_BL_NO, NVL(BI.BI_MBL_NO, '-')) AS BL_NO, BI.BI_MBL_NO AS MBL_NO, BI.BI_HBL_NO AS HBL_NO, BI.BI_STATUS_CD AS BL_STATUS_CD, ED.ED_ER_NO AS REQ_NO, 'EXPORT' AS DECLARE_TYPE, ED.ED_STATUS_CD AS DECLARE_STATUS_CD, CASE ED.ED_STATUS_CD WHEN 'DCLR_WAIT' THEN '신고대기' WHEN 'DCLR_REVIEW' THEN '심사중' WHEN 'DCLR_DONE' THEN '신고완료' WHEN 'DCLR_REJ' THEN '반려' WHEN 'DCLR_SUPP_REQ' THEN '보완요청' WHEN 'DCLR_SUPP_SUB' THEN '보완제출' WHEN 'TAX_UNPAID' THEN '세금납부대기' WHEN 'TAX_PAID' THEN '세금납부완료' ELSE NVL(ED.ED_STATUS_CD, '-') END AS DECLARE_STATUS, NVL(OW.OWR_NM, ER.ER_ONER_NM) AS OWNER_NAME, NVL(EI.ITEM_NM, NVL(ER.ER_COMMENT, '-')) AS ITEM_NAME, CASE WHEN ECM.ECM_NO IS NULL THEN 'MISSING' ELSE 'SUBMITTED' END AS SUBMIT_STATUS_CD, CASE WHEN ECM.ECM_NO IS NULL THEN '미제출' ELSE '제출완료' END AS SUBMIT_STATUS, NVL(ECM.ECM_SBMSN_DT, NVL(ED.ED_DCLR_DT, NVL(ER.ER_RQST_DT, ER.ER_REGIST_DT))) AS SUBMIT_DT, TRC.TRC_NO AS TRANSPORT_NO, TRC.TRC_DEPT_PORT_CD AS DEPARTURE_PORT, TRC.TRC_ARVL_PORT_CD AS ARRIVAL_PORT, TRC.TRC_STATUS_CD AS TRANSPORT_STATUS_CD, NVL(ECM.ECM_TRDR_NM, TRC.TRC_TRDR_NM) AS TRADER_NAME, WH.WH_NM, WZ.WZ_NM, WH.WH_STATUS_CD, WI.WI_STATUS_CD, WI.WI_SEAL_NO, CASE WHEN ED.ED_GG_NO IS NULL OR ED.ED_GG_NO = 0 THEN '화물그룹번호 없음' WHEN ECM.ECM_NO IS NULL THEN '적재화물목록 미제출' ELSE NVL(ECM.ECM_RMRK_CN, '화물 현황 확인 대상') END AS REMARK, EI.QUANTITY AS QUANTITY, EI.WEIGHT AS WEIGHT, NVL(ECM.ECM_SBMSN_DT, NVL(ED.ED_DCLR_DT, NVL(ER.ER_RQST_DT, ER.ER_REGIST_DT))) AS SORT_DT FROM EXP_DCLR ED LEFT JOIN EXP_RQST ER ON ER.ER_NO = ED.ED_ER_NO LEFT JOIN OWNER OW ON OW.OWR_ID = ER.ER_OWR_ID LEFT JOIN EXP_CARGO_MANIFEST ECM ON ECM.ECM_GG_NO = ED.ED_GG_NO LEFT JOIN BL_ISSU BI ON BI.BI_GG_NO = ED.ED_GG_NO LEFT JOIN TRAN_RCP TRC ON TRC.TRC_BI_NO = BI.BI_NO LEFT JOIN ( SELECT EDI_ER_NO, MIN(EDI_EXPT_GDS_NM) || CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 1 THEN ' 외 ' || TO_CHAR(COUNT(*) - 1) || '건' ELSE '' END AS ITEM_NM, TO_CHAR(SUM(NVL(EDI_DCLR_QTY, 0)), 'FM999,999,999') AS QUANTITY, TO_CHAR(SUM(NVL(EDI_NET_WT, 0)), 'FM999,999,999.000') AS WEIGHT FROM EXP_DCLR_ITEM GROUP BY EDI_ER_NO ) EI ON EI.EDI_ER_NO = ED.ED_ER_NO LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT WI.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY WI.WI_GG_NO ORDER BY WI.WI_UPDT_DT DESC, WI.WI_NO DESC) AS RN FROM WAREHOUSE_ITEM WI WHERE WI.WI_USE_YN = 'Y' ) WHERE RN = 1 ) WI ON WI.WI_GG_NO = ED.ED_GG_NO LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE_ZONE WZ ON WZ.WZ_NO = WI.WIL_CL_NO LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE WH ON WH.WH_NO = WZ.WZ_WH_NO WHERE (#{declareType} IS NULL OR #{declareType} = 'ALL' OR #{declareType} = 'EXPORT')
AND ED.ED_ER_NO LIKE '%' || #{reqNo} || '%'
AND ED.ED_STATUS_CD = #{declareStatusCd}
AND NVL(ECM.ECM_SBMSN_DT, NVL(ED.ED_DCLR_DT, NVL(ER.ER_RQST_DT, ER.ER_REGIST_DT))) >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND NVL(ECM.ECM_SBMSN_DT, NVL(ED.ED_DCLR_DT, NVL(ER.ER_RQST_DT, ER.ER_REGIST_DT))) < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND ( ED.ED_ER_NO LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR ECM.ECM_BL_NO LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR BI.BI_MBL_NO LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR BI.BI_HBL_NO LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR OW.OWR_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR ER.ER_ONER_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR ER.ER_COMMENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR EI.ITEM_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR WH.WH_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR WZ.WZ_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
UNION ALL
/* 수입 적재화물: HBL이 없는 수입 화물 */ SELECT TO_CHAR(ICM.ICM_NO) AS LIST_NO, ID.ID_GG_NO AS GG_NO, ID.ID_CGO_MNG_NO AS CARGO_MANAGE_NO, NVL(ICM.ICM_MBL_NO, ID.ID_MBL_NO) AS BL_NO, NVL(ICM.ICM_MBL_NO, ID.ID_MBL_NO) AS MBL_NO, ICM.ICM_HBL_NO AS HBL_NO, BI.BI_STATUS_CD AS BL_STATUS_CD, ID.ID_IR_NO AS REQ_NO, 'IMPORT' AS DECLARE_TYPE, ID.ID_STATUS_CD AS DECLARE_STATUS_CD, CASE ID.ID_STATUS_CD WHEN 'DCLR_WAIT' THEN '신고대기' WHEN 'DCLR_REVIEW' THEN '심사중' WHEN 'DCLR_DONE' THEN '신고완료' WHEN 'DCLR_REJ' THEN '반려' WHEN 'DCLR_SUPP_REQ' THEN '보완요청' WHEN 'DCLR_SUPP_SUB' THEN '보완제출' WHEN 'TAX_UNPAID' THEN '세금납부대기' WHEN 'TAX_PAID' THEN '세금납부완료' ELSE NVL(ID.ID_STATUS_CD, '-') END AS DECLARE_STATUS, NVL(O.OWR_NM, ID.ID_IMPR_NM) AS OWNER_NAME, NVL(ITEM.ITEM_NAME, '-') AS ITEM_NAME, CASE WHEN ICM.ICM_NO IS NULL THEN 'MISSING' ELSE 'SUBMITTED' END AS SUBMIT_STATUS_CD, CASE WHEN ICM.ICM_NO IS NULL THEN '미제출' ELSE '제출완료' END AS SUBMIT_STATUS, NVL(ICM.ICM_SBMSN_DT, ID.ID_DCLR_DT) AS SUBMIT_DT, TRC.TRC_NO AS TRANSPORT_NO, TRC.TRC_DEPT_PORT_CD AS DEPARTURE_PORT, TRC.TRC_ARVL_PORT_CD AS ARRIVAL_PORT, TRC.TRC_STATUS_CD AS TRANSPORT_STATUS_CD, TRC.TRC_TRDR_NM AS TRADER_NAME, WH.WH_NM, WZ.WZ_NM, WH.WH_STATUS_CD, WI.WI_STATUS_CD, WI.WI_SEAL_NO, CASE WHEN ID.ID_GG_NO IS NULL THEN '화물그룹번호 없음' WHEN ICM.ICM_NO IS NULL THEN '수입 화물목록 미제출' ELSE NVL(ICM.ICM_RMRK_CN, '화물 현황 확인 대상') END AS REMARK, ITEM.QUANTITY AS QUANTITY, ITEM.WEIGHT AS WEIGHT, NVL(ICM.ICM_SBMSN_DT, ID.ID_DCLR_DT) AS SORT_DT FROM IMP_DCLR ID LEFT JOIN IMP_RQST IR ON IR.IR_NO = ID.ID_IR_NO LEFT JOIN OWNER O ON O.OWR_ID = IR.IR_OWR_ID LEFT JOIN IMP_CARGO_MANIFEST ICM ON ICM.ICM_GG_NO = ID.ID_GG_NO LEFT JOIN BL_ISSU BI ON BI.BI_GG_NO = ID.ID_GG_NO LEFT JOIN TRAN_RCP TRC ON TRC.TRC_BI_NO = BI.BI_NO LEFT JOIN ( SELECT IDI_IR_NO, MIN(IDI_DCLR_GDSNM) || CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 1 THEN ' 외 ' || TO_CHAR(COUNT(*) - 1) || '건' ELSE '' END AS ITEM_NAME, TO_CHAR(SUM(NVL(IDI_QTY, 0)), 'FM999,999,999') AS QUANTITY, TO_CHAR(SUM(NVL(IDI_NET_WT, 0)), 'FM999,999,999.000') AS WEIGHT FROM IMP_DCLR_ITEM GROUP BY IDI_IR_NO ) ITEM ON ITEM.IDI_IR_NO = ID.ID_IR_NO LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT WI.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY WI.WI_GG_NO ORDER BY WI.WI_UPDT_DT DESC, WI.WI_NO DESC) AS RN FROM WAREHOUSE_ITEM WI WHERE WI.WI_USE_YN = 'Y' ) WHERE RN = 1 ) WI ON WI.WI_GG_NO = ID.ID_GG_NO LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE_ZONE WZ ON WZ.WZ_NO = WI.WIL_CL_NO LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE WH ON WH.WH_NO = WZ.WZ_WH_NO WHERE (#{declareType} IS NULL OR #{declareType} = 'ALL' OR #{declareType} = 'IMPORT') AND (ICM.ICM_HBL_NO IS NULL OR TRIM(ICM.ICM_HBL_NO) = '')
AND ID.ID_IR_NO LIKE '%' || #{reqNo} || '%'
AND ID.ID_STATUS_CD = #{declareStatusCd}
AND NVL(ICM.ICM_SBMSN_DT, ID.ID_DCLR_DT) >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND NVL(ICM.ICM_SBMSN_DT, ID.ID_DCLR_DT) < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND ( ID.ID_IR_NO LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR ID.ID_CGO_MNG_NO LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR ID.ID_MBL_NO LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR ID.ID_CGO_MNG_NO LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR ICM.ICM_MBL_NO LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR ICM.ICM_HBL_NO LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR O.OWR_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR ITEM.ITEM_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR WH.WH_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR WZ.WZ_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
) ORDER BY "submitDate" DESC NULLS LAST, "reqNo" DESC

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY NVL(ICM.ICM_SBMSN_DT, ID.ID_DCLR_DT) DESC NULLS LAST, ID.ID_IR_NO DESC) AS "no", TO_CHAR(ICM.ICM_NO) AS "listNo", TO_CHAR(ID.ID_GG_NO) AS "goodsGroupNo", ID.ID_CGO_MNG_NO AS "cargoManageNo", '혼재화물' AS "cargoType", 'MIXED' AS "cargoTypeCd", NVL(ICM.ICM_HBL_NO, ICM.ICM_MBL_NO) AS "blNo", ICM.ICM_MBL_NO AS "mblNo", ICM.ICM_HBL_NO AS "hblNo", BI.BI_STATUS_CD AS "blStatusCd", NVL(BI.BI_STATUS_CD, '-') AS "blStatus", ID.ID_IR_NO AS "reqNo", 'IMPORT' AS "declareType", ID.ID_STATUS_CD AS "declareStatusCd", CASE ID.ID_STATUS_CD WHEN 'DCLR_WAIT' THEN '신고대기' WHEN 'DCLR_REVIEW' THEN '심사중' WHEN 'DCLR_DONE' THEN '신고완료' WHEN 'DCLR_REJ' THEN '반려' WHEN 'DCLR_SUPP_REQ' THEN '보완요청' WHEN 'DCLR_SUPP_SUB' THEN '보완제출' WHEN 'TAX_UNPAID' THEN '세금납부대기' WHEN 'TAX_PAID' THEN '세금납부완료' ELSE NVL(ID.ID_STATUS_CD, '-') END AS "declareStatus", NVL(O.OWR_NM, ID.ID_IMPR_NM) AS "ownerName", NVL(ITEM.ITEM_NAME, '-') AS "itemName", '-' AS "vesselName", 'SUBMITTED' AS "submitStatusCd", '제출완료' AS "submitStatus", TO_CHAR(NVL(ICM.ICM_SBMSN_DT, ID.ID_DCLR_DT), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "submitDate", TRC.TRC_NO AS "transportNo", TRC.TRC_DEPT_PORT_CD AS "departurePort", TRC.TRC_ARVL_PORT_CD AS "arrivalPort", TRC.TRC_STATUS_CD AS "transportStatusCd", NVL(TRC.TRC_STATUS_CD, '-') AS "transportStatus", TRC.TRC_TRDR_NM AS "traderName", WH.WH_NM AS "warehouseName", WZ.WZ_NM AS "warehouseZoneName", WH.WH_STATUS_CD AS "warehouseStatusCd", NVL(WH.WH_STATUS_CD, '-') AS "warehouseStatus", WI.WI_STATUS_CD AS "warehouseItemStatusCd", NVL(WI.WI_STATUS_CD, '-') AS "warehouseItemStatus", WI.WI_SEAL_NO AS "sealNo", NVL(ICM.ICM_RMRK_CN, '화물 현황 확인 대상') AS "remark", ITEM.QUANTITY AS "quantity", ITEM.WEIGHT AS "weight" FROM IMP_DCLR ID LEFT JOIN IMP_RQST IR ON IR.IR_NO = ID.ID_IR_NO LEFT JOIN OWNER O ON O.OWR_ID = IR.IR_OWR_ID INNER JOIN IMP_CARGO_MANIFEST ICM ON ICM.ICM_GG_NO = ID.ID_GG_NO AND ICM.ICM_HBL_NO IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(ICM.ICM_HBL_NO) IS NOT NULL LEFT JOIN BL_ISSU BI ON BI.BI_GG_NO = ID.ID_GG_NO LEFT JOIN TRAN_RCP TRC ON TRC.TRC_BI_NO = BI.BI_NO LEFT JOIN ( SELECT IDI_IR_NO, MIN(IDI_DCLR_GDSNM) || CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 1 THEN ' 외 ' || TO_CHAR(COUNT(*) - 1) || '건' ELSE '' END AS ITEM_NAME, TO_CHAR(SUM(NVL(IDI_QTY, 0)), 'FM999,999,999') AS QUANTITY, TO_CHAR(SUM(NVL(IDI_NET_WT, 0)), 'FM999,999,999.000') AS WEIGHT FROM IMP_DCLR_ITEM GROUP BY IDI_IR_NO ) ITEM ON ITEM.IDI_IR_NO = ID.ID_IR_NO LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT WI.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY WI.WI_GG_NO ORDER BY WI.WI_UPDT_DT DESC, WI.WI_NO DESC) AS RN FROM WAREHOUSE_ITEM WI WHERE WI.WI_USE_YN = 'Y' ) WHERE RN = 1 ) WI ON WI.WI_GG_NO = ID.ID_GG_NO LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE_ZONE WZ ON WZ.WZ_NO = WI.WIL_CL_NO LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE WH ON WH.WH_NO = WZ.WZ_WH_NO WHERE (#{declareType} IS NULL OR #{declareType} = 'ALL' OR #{declareType} = 'IMPORT')
AND ID.ID_IR_NO LIKE '%' || #{reqNo} || '%'
AND ID.ID_STATUS_CD = #{declareStatusCd}
AND NVL(ICM.ICM_SBMSN_DT, ID.ID_DCLR_DT) >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND NVL(ICM.ICM_SBMSN_DT, ID.ID_DCLR_DT) < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND ( ID.ID_IR_NO LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR ID.ID_CGO_MNG_NO LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR ICM.ICM_MBL_NO LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR ICM.ICM_HBL_NO LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR O.OWR_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR ITEM.ITEM_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR WH.WH_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR WZ.WZ_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
ORDER BY NVL(ICM.ICM_SBMSN_DT, ID.ID_DCLR_DT) DESC NULLS LAST, ID.ID_IR_NO DESC
